title: CUG Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Computer Assistant Posts
description: The Central University of Gujarat (CUG) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Computer Assistant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed any degree can apply for the CUG Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, application fee, salary, and...
